title: senecio aquaticus subsp. calvescens
intro: Senecio aquaticus subsp. calvescens, commonly known as Rough Thistle or Sea Thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and stomach ulcers. The plant is also used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction, antiseptic properties, and as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Senecio aquaticus subsp. calvescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
